title: Better Villages - Ice and Fire Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between Better Villages and Ice and Fire
body:
## Intro : Add this datapack to the game for create a better compatibility between Better Villages and Ice and Fire If you're a fan of both the Better Villages and Ice and Fire mods, you may have noticed that they don't always work well together. This can make your Minecraft experience less enjoyable and more frustrating. That's where this compatibility datapack comes in. This datapack ensures that Better Villages and Ice and Fire can coexist peacefully in your Minecraft world. With this datapack installed, you can enjoy all the benefits of both mods without any conflicts. Note: For a perfect compatibility, don't forget to modify the weight for the houses (if necessary) in the Ice and Fire config (instance/config/iceandfire-common.toml). Personally, during my tests I found that the number of houses was too high, I had to adjust it to reduce the number of Ice And Fire houses in the villages. But this is only my opinion, I let you find the ideal setting ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb228d1b1cd81d54fecd6dbb5c0a25b507e235f.png) ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.
